item.title: Extremal Elastic Metamaterials for Robust Underwater Sound Absorption via Morphogenesis Design
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 20 July 2026

Source: Matter

Author(s): Yang Wang, Zhoufu Zheng, Xuegang Zhang, Ya He, Tao Li, Yong Xiao, Haibin Yang, Jie Zhong, Dianlong Yu, Jihong Wen

item.title: Extremal Elastic Metamaterials for Robust Underwater Sound Absorption via Morphogenesis Design
item.description: The static modulus of solids scales with the square of elastic wave speed, constraining underwater sound absorbers that require both high stiffness and slow propagation. Through morphogenesis design, we developed an elastic metamaterial with weakly coupled isotropic-isochoric eigenmodes that decouples modulus from wave speed, achieving a 6.8-fold enhancement over isotropic limits. Integrated with rubber, the composite delivers pressure-invariant absorption (>0.9 average coefficient) across a three-octave low-frequency band up to 4.5 MPa.

item.title: All-Emission Control in 2D-Photonic Crystal Microlasers
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 7 July 2026

Source: Matter

Author(s): Zhiyang Xu, Leyuan Ji, Siqi Chang, Xiaomei Gao, Yinzhou Yan, Tianrui Zhai

item.title: All-Emission Control in 2D-Photonic Crystal Microlasers
item.description:
Publication date: 6 May 2026

Source: Matter, Volume 9, Issue 5

Author(s): Zhiyang Xu, Leyuan Ji, Siqi Chang, Xiaomei Gao, Yinzhou Yan, Tianrui Zhai

item.title: Structure-Aided Chemical Signal Propagation in Hydrogel Metastructures
item.description:
Publication date: 3 June 2026

Source: Matter, Volume 9, Issue 6

Author(s): Styliani-Theodosia Korfia, Foteini Trigka, Víctor Riera Naranjo, Sara Bizzi, Hang Zhang, Bolei Deng, Michael Markus Lerch

item.title: Decoupled and Non-Volatile Prestress Programming of Tensegrity Metamaterials Enables Persistent Mechanical Function
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 10 June 2026

Source: Matter

Author(s): Xiaoming Yu, Meiling Zhang, Jianwei Sun, Chaozong Liu, Zhihui Zhang, Luquan Ren

item.title: Decoupled and Non-Volatile Prestress Programming of Tensegrity Metamaterials Enables Persistent Mechanical Function
item.description: Yu et al. develop a pufferfish-inspired tensegrity platform that uses humidity to program internal prestress and a mechanical lock to store it as non-volatile memory. Once set, the structure maintains its mechanical state without continuous energy input, enabling persistent functions including timed release, impact protection, and adaptive load bearing.

item.title: Thermoelectric-Flow Synergy for Femtosecond Laser Writing of Iced Ferroelectric Nematics
item.description: While the emerging ferroelectric fluids hold promise for advanced photonics, patterning their room-temperature “iced” state has remained a major challenge. Here, the authors demonstrate that femtosecond laser direct writing can precisely engineer polar domains by exploiting a synergy of thermoelectric and flow effects. This approach transforms the previously unpatternable material into a versatile platform for complex nonlinear optical devices. Their work establishes a robust strategy for programming nonlinear photonic metamaterials.
